messages.subject: TalentBridge placement fee — confirmation for upcoming searches
messages.body_text:
Hi Nina,

Great working with Vectrix on the Sr. Frontend search. As we ramp up the candidate pipeline, I want to confirm our fee arrangement: our standard rate is 18% of first-year base salary, per our original agreement.

For the Sr. Frontend role (band $145K–$165K), that's approximately $26,100–$29,700 depending on final offer.

I'm also attaching Anya Chen's resume — she's our strongest candidate in the pipeline and I'd like to discuss getting her into your process this week.

Let me know if you'd like to discuss before we proceed.

— Amanda Reyes
Senior Recruiter, TalentBridge
amanda.reyes@talentbridge.com

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge placement fee — renegotiation
messages.body_text:
Hi Amanda,

Thank you. We want to continue working with TalentBridge, but 18% is difficult at our current stage. Our ask: 15% for the current Sr. Frontend placement, with the understanding that we'll have at least one more hire (Customer Success Manager) in Q1 if our Meridian deal closes.

We're seed-stage and every placement fee is meaningful. Would 15% work for this placement?

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io
messages.body_html:

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge placement fee — renegotiation
messages.body_text:
Hi Nina,

I appreciate the context. I can't go to 15% on a single placement — our floor for single-role searches is 17%.

However, if you can confirm the CSM role in writing as a second placement, I can offer 16% across both. That would put the Sr. Frontend fee at approximately $23,200–$26,400 at the current band.

If the CSM role is contingent on the Meridian deal and you can't commit now, we can revisit when the deal closes.

— Amanda Reyes
Senior Recruiter, TalentBridge
amanda.reyes@talentbridge.com

messages.subject: Re: TalentBridge placement fee — renegotiation
messages.body_text:
Amanda,

Understood. The CSM role is genuinely contingent on Meridian — I can't commit to it in writing today.

Can we agree on 17% for the Sr. Frontend placement now and revisit the full rate agreement once we have clarity on the CSM timeline (end of Q1 at the latest)? I want to move Anya Chen forward — I just want the rate confirmed before her final round.

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io
